name: Тайный Агент
description: Knowledge is power. The best way to defeat your enemies is by stealing what they know and replacing it with misinformation. To that end, you have been trained in the ways of covert warfare, giving you a broad range of abilities to complement your fearsome gunnery skills.

features.name: Operative Training
features.description: Your covert training grants you the following benefits.

details.concealedShot: You learn the {@spell Concealed Shot|GC:VSS'24} cantrip. Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma is your spellcasting ability for this cantrip (choose when you select this subclass).
details.operativeTools: You gain a {@item Disguise Kit|XPHB} and {@item Thieves' Tools|XPHB}, and you have proficiency with them.
details.skillProficiencies: You gain proficiency in two of these skills of your choice: {@skill Deception}, {@skill Investigation}, {@skill Persuasion}, {@skill Sleight of Hand}, or {@skill Stealth}.

features.name: Parting Shot
features.description: [Maneuver] When you take the {@action Dash|XPHB}, {@action Disengage|XPHB}, or {@action Dodge|XPHB} action on your turn, you can expend one Risk Die to make a ranged attack using a weapon as a {@action Bonus Action|XPHB}. Add the Risk Die to the damage roll on a hit.

features.name: Fieldcraft
features.description: Your experience in the field grants you the following benefits.

details.quickChange: Using a {@item Disguise Kit|XPHB}, you can create a Costume and don it as a {@action Bonus Action|XPHB}.
details.slickTalker: Whenever you make a Charisma ({@skill Deception}) or Charisma ({@skill Persuasion}) check, you can treat a {@dice d20} roll of 9 or lower as a 10.

features.name: Exit Strategy
features.description: When you take damage, you can take a {@action Reaction|XPHB} to evade further harm. You have the {@condition Invisible|XPHB} condition until the start of your next turn, and you can immediately move up to 10 feet. Once you use this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a {@variantrule Short Rest|XPHB} or {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}. You can also restore your use of it by expending one Risk Die (no action required).

features.name: License to Kill
features.description: Whenever you deal damage with a Ranged weapon, you can expend either one or two Risk Dice and add them to the damage roll. If you roll the highest number on a Risk Die, you can roll the die again and add it to the damage without expending it, rolling again if it is the highest number again, and so on. The maximum number of Risk Dice you can add to the damage equals your {@variantrule Proficiency Bonus|XPHB}.
